description_long: This is a large, multi-engine jet airplane with a robust fuselage and a high-mounted, straight wing configuration. The aircraft features eight underwing jet engines, four on each side, and a distinctive H-tail with twin vertical stabilizers and a horizontal stabilizer connecting them. The landing gear is visible beneath the wings, with multiple wheels indicating a heavy-duty, multi-bogie arrangement suitable for supporting significant weight. The cockpit is positioned at the forward end of the fuselage, with a row of windows running along the side, suggesting a multi-seat, enclosed design. The exterior is primarily a light gray color, with minimal markings and a utilitarian, functional appearance.
description: A large, gray, multi-engine jet airplane with a high-mounted straight wing, H-tail, and eight underwing engines. It has a forward, enclosed cockpit and heavy-duty landing gear.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the nose, cockpit windows, high-mounted wings, and four visible underwing engines on the left side.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the H-tail configuration, twin vertical stabilizers, and the full set of eight underwing engines.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the fuselage, the row of windows, and the landing gear beneath the wings.
description_view_3: Front-right view emphasizing the cockpit, forward fuselage, and the symmetrical arrangement of the engines and wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight wings with no visible winglets and a slight anhedral angle; engines mounted in pods beneath the wings.
attribute_engine_type: Eight underwing jet engines, four per wing.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with twin vertical stabilizers and a single horizontal stabilizer connecting them.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Multi-bogie, retractable landing gear with multiple wheels under each wing and a nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows at the front of the fuselage.
